CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '102') , DateDebutProgrammee__c, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '103') , DateDebutProgrammee__c, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '105') , DateDebutProgrammee__c, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '2') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '51') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '115') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '116') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '110') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '111') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '114') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '108') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '101') , EndDate, null))))))))))))
CustomField.label: DateDeEventIntent
